revision.comment: Bot: created missing page [[Talk:Azumi-no-isora]] redirect to enwiki [[Talk:Azumi-no-isora]]
Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:qq]]{{Hidden category}}[[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia redirects
Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Azumi-no-isora); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1316106439 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Azumi-no-isora | revid=1316106439 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Stub| {{WikiProject Japan|myth=yes|shinto=yes|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Mythology|importance=mid}} }}
== Information == I cannot find any information on this god other than his domain, the seashore.
[[User:Shikino|Shikino]] 18:11, 22 October 2005 (UTC)
Perhaps, I think Isora is {{nihongo|Azumi-no-isora|阿曇磯良|}}. He is worshiped at {{nihongo|Mekari Shrine|和布刈神社|}} of Kita-Kyushu, {{nihongo|Shiga Shrine|志賀神社|}} of Tsushima, and so on. [[User:Nnh|nnh]] 09:56, 10 March 2006 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Seriously how did this get accepted ==
I’m surprised this article was even allowed onto here. Seriously there were zero sources.[[User:CycoMa|CycoMa]] ([[User talk:CycoMa|talk]]) 07:23, 11 October 2020 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Azumi-no-isora here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

== Information == I cannot find any information on this god other than his domain, the seashore.
[[User:Shikino|Shikino]] 18:11, 22 October 2005 (UTC)
Perhaps, I think Isora is {{nihongo|Azumi-no-isora|阿曇磯良|}}. He is worshiped at {{nihongo|Mekari Shrine|和布刈神社|}} of Kita-Kyushu, {{nihongo|Shiga Shrine|志賀神社|}} of Tsushima, and so on. [[User:Nnh|nnh]] 09:56, 10 March 2006 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Seriously how did this get accepted ==
I’m surprised this article was even allowed onto here. Seriously there were zero sources.[[User:CycoMa|CycoMa]] ([[User talk:CycoMa|talk]]) 07:23, 11 October 2020 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
